name: LoanMax Title Loans
description_short: Orlando, FL LoanMax Title Loans at 2653 S Orange Ave provides fast title loans and cash advances with convenient weekday and Saturday hours.
description_long:
LoanMax Title Loans has a dedicated location at 2653 S Orange Avenue in Orlando, FL, open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, and Saturday from 9 AM to 2 PM (closed Sundays). This standalone storefront serves Orlando residents needing quick access to title loans and emergency cash.

At this Orlando location, you can apply for title loans, get cash advances against your vehicle's title, and speak with loan specialists about your options. Call 407-863-1590 during business hours to discuss your loan needs or to ask questions before visiting. The staff can explain the application process, required documents, and approval timeline specific to your situation in Orlando.

If you're an Orlando resident facing a short-term cash need and own a vehicle, visit the South Orange Avenue location with your ID, proof of income, and vehicle documents. LoanMax Title Loans provides fast processing—many applications are approved the same day.
pros: Fast emergency funding up to $10,000 for borrowers with vehicle equity
Simple qualification requirements: only vehicle, photo ID, and clear title needed
Multiple Michigan locations (Southgate, Taylor, Garden City, Detroit, Center Line) for accessibility
Accepts multiple payment methods (cash, check, debit card, Western Union)
Licensed and regulated by state financial authorities in multiple jurisdictions
Extended operating hours including Saturday availability for convenience
25+ years of operational history and industry reputation
cons: Vehicle serves as collateral—borrower risks losing their car if unable to repay
Website does not disclose specific interest rates, APRs, or fee structures, making cost comparison difficult
No published loan terms, repayment schedules, or prepayment penalty information available
Loan approval subject to vehicle evaluation and ability to repay, which are undefined criteria
Title loans are generally high-cost compared to traditional personal loans and should not be used long-term
best_for: Vehicle owners with immediate emergency cash needs who have limited access to traditional credit
Borrowers with substantial equity in their car who need funding faster than conventional loans allow
People in the greater Detroit area seeking a quick solution and able to repay within a short timeframe
diagnosis: LoanMax is best for vehicle owners facing genuine emergencies who have equity in their car and cannot qualify for traditional loans, need funding within 24 hours, and can repay quickly. The major caveat is that borrowers must be prepared to lose their vehicle if unable to repay, and the lack of disclosed rates and terms makes it impossible to assess true borrowing costs before applying—requesting a rate quote is essential before proceeding.
services: Payment processing via cash, check, debit card, or Western Union
State-compliant lending in Michigan, Virginia, Delaware, South Carolina, New Mexico, and Nevada
meta_description: Orlando, FL LoanMax Title Loans at 2653 S Orange Ave. Fast title loans, same-day approval.
